✅ 12 Questions answered
✅ 7 Levers compiled
✅ Teammate roles defined

Current time: Tuesday, March 10th, 2026 — 11:24 PM (America/New_York)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

content.thinking:
This is a cron heartbeat/check-in for the "Sisters Hourly Overnight" task. Let me assess what's actually needed here.

The cron is asking for status reports from Forge and Scholar (sister bots), and showing overnight mission progress. But I'm Sai — the main agent. This cron is delivering a status update to me about the sisters' overnight work.

Let me check if there's anything that actually needs my attention or action. The message shows completed items (✅) and a dashboard link. It's essentially an informational check-in.

Since there's nothing that requires intervention — the items are marked complete, and this is a routine overnight status ping — I should respond with HEARTBEAT_OK or a brief acknowledgment.
 
Wait, I need to reconsider what this cron is actually asking for. The instructions say to return a summary as plain text, but I'm realizing the sisters are separate bots and I can't report on their behalf.
